verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come and make my heart your home Come and be everything I am and all I know Search me through and through Till my heart becomes a home for you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: A home for you…. . A home for you…. . Let everything I do Open up a door For you to come through And in my heart will be A place where you wanna be

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come and make my heart, come and make it your home Come and be everything I am and all I know Search me through and through Till my heart becomes a home for you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Till my heart becomes a home for you Till my heart becomes a home for you A home for you.
